properties.Message:
"Hello,

The file '" + ${filename} + "' passed validation but failed to load into PSA.FLEET_MASTER.
Here is the DB Error: " + ${db_error_detail} + "

Regards,
Sukumar"
properties.Subject: Fleet PSA - Database Load Failed

properties.Message:
"Hello,

The file uploaded encountered errors, and the 'Chassis
Number' column contains NULL values.
Please find the file named and located at: '"
+ #{sftp.remote.error} + ${filename} + "' here and review.

Regards,

Sukumar"
properties.Subject: Fleet Vehicle master contains NULL

properties.Message:
"Hello,

The file '" + ${filename} + "' passed validation and loaded into PSA.FLEET_MASTER Successfully at " + ${sys.load.date} + "

Regards,
Sukumar"
properties.Subject: Fleet PSA Load Completed Successfully

properties.null_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM FLOWFILE WHERE Chassis_Number IS NULL OR TRIM(Chassis_Number) = ''

parameters.description: Email address to send emails of rejection/success
parameters.name: alert.to

parameters.description: Folder location for Archiving the success files
parameters.name: sftp.remote.archive

parameters.description: The domain we are working on
parameters.name: sys.domain.name
